text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
110 
MDCR_STATE_CD 
LABEL: 
Medicare — State Code — FIPS 
DESCRIPTION: This field specifies the state Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the Medicare 
beneficiary. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
MBSF (derived) 
VALUES: 
2-digit FIPS (e.g., 17) or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment)
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
04 = Arizona 
05 = Arkansas 
06 = California 
08 = Colorado 
09 = Connecticut 
10 =
